title: MIAX Sapphire Options Exchange - Reminder for March 1, 2026 Trading Floor Non-Transaction Fee Waivers and Updates
raw_text:
MIAX Sapphire — Technical Alert, Trading Alert, Fee Change Alert — MIAX Sapphire Options Exchange - Reminder for March 1, 2026 Trading Floor Non-Transaction Fee Waivers and Updates
Technical Alert, Trading Alert, Fee Change Alert MIAX Sapphire February 25, 2026 | 11:12 AM MIAX Sapphire Options Exchange - Reminder for March 1, 2026 Trading Floor Non-Transaction Fee Waivers and Updates As previously announced in the July 18, 2025 Alert , the "Initial Waiver Period" for certain Trading Floor non-transaction fees will automatically end on February 28, 2026. Effective March 1, 2026, pending filing with the SEC, MIAX Sapphire Options Exchange will update Trading Floor non-transaction fee waivers and begin charging non-transaction fees as follows: Application and Initiation Fee (one-time) Floor Broker: $2,000 New – waived for NEW Floor Brokers Floor Market Maker: $2,000 Participant Fees (monthly) Floor Broker (per firm): $1,250 New – waived for NEW Floor Broker firm of initial partial month and following three (3) full months Floor Market Maker (per firm): $1,250 Trading Permit Fees (monthly) Floor Broker (per firm): $5,000 New – waived for NEW Floor Broker firm of initial partial month and following three (3) full months New – extension of 100 contract ADV threshold – CURRENT Floor Brokers firm that execute at least 100 contract ADV will have the monthly trading permit fee waived in the relevant month Floor Market Maker (each): $5,350 New – removal of 100 contract ADV threshold – Floor Market Maker (each) will be charged the monthly trading permit fee regardless of ADV New monthly rate for ‘Alternate’ Floor Market Maker (each): $500 Desk and Badge Fees (monthly) Desk: $350 per desk, applicable to non-permit holders (i.e. clerks) and each additional-requested desk in excess of the allotment provided to Floor Brokers and Floor Market Makers pursuant to Section 9)c) of the Fee Schedule for permit holders Badge: $100 per badge, applicable to non-permit holders (i.e. clerks) Data Center Hosting Fees Initial Fee (one-time): $500 per 9-rack unit Monthly Fee: $1,500 per 9-rack unit Other fees like "Remote Services Fees" and "Shipping and Storage Fees" were not waived in the "Initial Waiver Period" and will continue to be charged. Attached is a highlighted summary of the March 2026 fee changes for MIAX Sapphire Options Exchange. Complete details will be contained in the March 2026 MIAX Sapphire Option Fee Schedule, when posted on the MIAX website at MIAX Sapphire Fee Schedule . For additional information, please contact MIAX Sales at Sales@miaxglobal.com or (609) 897-8177. If you need assistance, please contact MIAX Trading Operations at TradingOperations@miaxglobal.com or (609) 897-7302. MIAX Sapphire Highlight of Fee Changes 03012026

MIAX Sapphire — Regulatory Alert — MIAX Exchange Group - Options Markets - Adoption of a Universal Obvious & Catastrophic Error Submission Form
Regulatory Alert MIAX Sapphire February 24, 2026 | 04:49 PM MIAX Exchange Group - Options Markets - Adoption of a Universal Obvious & Catastrophic Error Submission Form In coordination with the other U.S.-listed options exchanges, the MIAX Options Exchange, Pearl Options Exchange, Emerald Options Exchange, and Sapphire Options Exchange have adopted a Universal Obvious and Catastrophic Error submission form, as agreed upon by the Listed Options Market Structure Working Group (LOMSWG). For more information, please refer to the following Regulatory Circulars: MIAX Options RC 2026-25 MIAX Pearl Options RC 2026-25 MIAX Emerald Options RC 2026-24 MIAX Sapphire Options RC 2026-25 Regulatory inquiries should be directed to Regulatory@miaxglobal.com or (609) 897-7309.

title: MIAX Exchange Group - Options Markets - New Listings Effective for February 24, 2026
raw_text:
MIAX Emerald — Listing Alert — MIAX Exchange Group - Options Markets - New Listings Effective for February 24, 2026
Listing Alert MIAX Emerald February 23, 2026 | 01:18 PM MIAX Exchange Group - Options Markets - New Listings Effective for February 24, 2026 The attached option classes will begin trading on the MIAX Options Exchange, MIAX Pearl Options Exchange, MIAX Emerald Options Exchange, and MIAX Sapphire Options Exchange on Tuesday, February 24, 2026. Market Makers can use the Member Firm Portal (MFP) to manage their option class assignments. All LMM and RMM Option Class Assignments must be entered prior to 6:00 PM ET on the business day immediately preceding the effective date. All changes made after 6:00 PM ET on a given day will be effective two trading days later. MIAX Options and MIAX Emerald Options Primary Lead Market Maker (PLMM) assignments and un-assignments will not be supported via the MFP. Please contact MIAX Listings with any questions at Listings@miaxglobal.com or (609) 897-7308. MIAX Sapphire Listing Alert 2.24.2026 MIAX Emerald Listing Alert New Class Listings 2.24.2026 Pearl Listing Alert New Class Listings 2.24.2026 MIAX Listing Alert New Class Listings 2.24.2026

raw_text:
MIAX Pearl — Regulatory Alert, Trading Alert — MIAX Exchange Group - Options Markets - Change to the Market for Underlying Security Used for Openings on MIAX Options, MIAX Pearl Options, MIAX Emerald Options, and MIAX Sapphire Options for Symbol SGOV Effective Monday, February 23, 2026
Regulatory Alert, Trading Alert MIAX Pearl February 23, 2026 | 07:01 AM MIAX Exchange Group - Options Markets - Change to the Market for Underlying Security Used for Openings on MIAX Options, MIAX Pearl Options, MIAX Emerald Options, and MIAX Sapphire Options for Symbol SGOV Effective Monday, February 23, 2026 iShares 0-3 Month Treasury Bond ETF (“SGOV”) transferred primary listing from the NYSE Arca to the New York Stock Exchange (“NYSE”) effective today, Monday, February 23, 2026. MIAX Options, MIAX Pearl Options, MIAX Emerald Options, and MIAX Sapphire Options will use NYSE as the “market for the underlying security” for the purpose of Openings on the Exchange. For more information, please refer to the following Regulatory Circulars: MIAX Options Regulatory Circular 2026-23 MIAX Pearl Options Regulatory Circular 2026-23 MIAX Emerald Options Regulatory Circular 2026-22 MIAX Sapphire Options Regulatory Circular 2026-23 Please direct questions to the Regulatory Department at Regulatory@miaxglobal.com or (609) 897-7309.

title: MIAX Sapphire Options Exchange - Trading Floor - Reminder: Virtual Trading Floor (VTF) Test - February 28, 2026
raw_text:
MIAX Sapphire — Technical Alert, Trading Alert, Regulatory Alert — MIAX Sapphire Options Exchange - Trading Floor - Reminder: Virtual Trading Floor (VTF) Test - February 28, 2026
Technical Alert, Trading Alert, Regulatory Alert MIAX Sapphire February 19, 2026 | 10:25 AM MIAX Sapphire Options Exchange - Trading Floor - Reminder: Virtual Trading Floor (VTF) Test - February 28, 2026 As previously announced in the January 21, 2026 Alert , MIAX Sapphire will provide access to a Virtual Trading Floor (VTF) system to be used in the event the physical trading floor is inaccessible. The first 2026 test will occur on Saturday, February 28, 2026, from 8:30 a.m. to 11:30 a.m. ET. The test will use the VTF system in combination with the MIAX Sapphire Production Environment to allow Market Makers and Floor Brokers to familiarize themselves with the VTF system. Note: The VTF system operates independently and does not require integration with market maker or floor broker systems. The use of the VTF system along with the Sapphire production systems for this exercise is solely for replicating potential trading scenarios. Please send an email to TradingOperations@miaxglobal.com once you have successfully completed testing. Floor Broker Test Plan : Log in and confirm audio Log in and confirm video access Enter a trade into the Sapphire Trading system from your remote location Log into Member Firm Portal from your remote location and perform a post trade allocation Market Maker Test Plan : Log in and confirm audio Log in and confirm video access Respond to an order and participate in a trade Confirm receipt of trade allocation via your firms network Confirm receipt of trade allocation via the trade drop if applicable Log into Member Firm Portal from your remote location Additional test dates will be provided through future Alerts. For additional information, please contact MIAX Trading Operations at TradingOperations@miaxglobal.com or (609) 897-7302. Regulatory inquiries should be directed to Regulatory@miaxglobal.com or (609) 897-7309. Sales inquiries should be directed to Sales@miaxglobal.com , (609) 897-8177 or visit miaxglobal.com .

title: MIAX Emerald Options Exchange - Planned network switch refresh, upgrade for 10G ULL extranet switches and mandatory testing requirements
raw_text:
MIAX Emerald — Technical Alert, Trading Alert — MIAX Emerald Options Exchange - Planned network switch refresh, upgrade for 10G ULL extranet switches and mandatory testing requirements
Technical Alert, Trading Alert MIAX Emerald February 13, 2026 | 12:16 PM MIAX Emerald Options Exchange - Planned network switch refresh, upgrade for 10G ULL extranet switches and mandatory testing requirements MIAX Emerald Options will upgrade 10G ULL extranet switches and increase the number of available customer-facing edge switches from six to ten on Friday, June 12, 2026 post close of trading. Existing 10G ULL extranet switches are approaching vendor end of support and require replacement. Existing firm cross connects will be migrated by MIAX on the cutover date to the six upgraded switches. For the four additional extranet edge switches, if firms want cross-connect (CC) activation to coincide with the upgrade, they must submit LOAs at least four weeks prior to the Friday, June 12, 2026 cutover date. Following the upgrade, firms must conduct mandatory testing : Mandatory testing will be held on Saturday, June 13, 2026 from 9:00 a.m. to 1:00 p.m. ET. Firms are required to perform the following verifications: Verify all 10G ULL CCs by logging into each subscribed application for each CC (i.e. establish application-level socket connections to MEO, MEI, FOI, CTD, etc., for all ports, across all CCs) and verify the login. Verify A/B feed heartbeats for all subscribed multicast feeds on each CC. After verifying connectivity, firms must send an email to TradingOperations@miaxglobal.com and receive confirmation testing was completed successfully. Please contact MIAX Trading Operations at TradingOperations@miaxglobal.com or (609) 897-7302 to arrange testing or to receive additional information on the planned network refresh.

title: MIAX Exchange Group- Listing of Select Adjusted Option Classes
raw_text:
MIAX Pearl — Listing Alert — MIAX Exchange Group- Listing of Select Adjusted Option Classes
Listing Alert MIAX Pearl February 04, 2026 | 04:26 PM MIAX Exchange Group- Listing of Select Adjusted Option Classes The following adjusted option classes will begin trading on the MIAX Options Exchange, MIAX Pearl Options Exchange, MIAX Emerald Options Exchange and MIAX Sapphire Options Exchange on Thursday, February 5, 2026. Amcor plc (AMCR1) Alibaba Group Holding Limited (BABA2) GameStop Corp. (GME1) Hudson Pacific Properties, Inc. (HPP1) Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN1) 2x Long VIX Futures ETF (UVIX3) Market Makers can use the Member Firm Portal (MFP) to manage their option class assignments. AMCR should be used for class assignments in AMCR1 via MFP. BABA should be used for class assignments in BABA2 via MFP. GME should be used for class assignments in GME1 via MFP. HPP should be used for class assignments in HPP1 via MFP. OPEN should be used for class assignments in OPEN1 via MFP. UVIX should be used for class assignments in UVIX3 via MFP. All RMM Option Class Assignments must be entered prior to 6:00 PM ET on the business day immediately preceding the effective date. All changes made after 6:00 PM ET on a given day will be effective two trading days later. Please contact MIAX Listings with any questions at Listings@miaxglobal.com or (609) 897-7308.

Listing Alert MIAX Emerald February 02, 2026 | 01:09 PM MIAX Exchange Group - Options Markets - New Listing Effective for February 3, 2026 The following option class will begin trading on the MIAX Options Exchange, MIAX Pearl Options Exchange, MIAX Emerald Options Exchange, and MIAX Sapphire Options Exchange on Tuesday, February 3, 2026: EquipmentShare.com Inc. (EQPT) Market Makers can use the Member Firm Portal (MFP) to manage their option class assignments. All LMM and RMM Option Class Assignments must be entered prior to 6:00 PM ET on the business day immediately preceding the effective date. All changes made after 6:00 PM ET on a given day will be effective two trading days later. MIAX Options and MIAX Emerald Options Primary Lead Market Maker (PLMM) assignments and un-assignments will not be supported via the MFP. Please contact MIAX Listings with any questions at Listings@miaxglobal.com or (609) 897-7308. title: MIAX Pearl Equities Exchange - Reminder of March 1, 2026 Fee Changes
raw_text:
MIAX Pearl Equities — Fee Change Alert — MIAX Pearl Equities Exchange - Reminder of March 1, 2026 Fee Changes
Fee Change Alert MIAX Pearl Equities February 27, 2026 | 11:05 AM MIAX Pearl Equities Exchange - Reminder of March 1, 2026 Fee Changes As previously mentioned in the January 30, 2026 Alert , effective March 1, 2026, MIAX Pearl Equities will make the below described changes to the Market Quoting Program. Effective March 1, 2026, the minimum threshold to qualify for the Market Quoting Program will be increased from an average of at least 750 securities per day to an average of at least 900 securities per day. Note: As a reminder, the updated minimum threshold of 900 securities will need to be achieved in February 2026 to qualify for and receive the rebate under this program for transactions in March 2026. Additionally, the updated Market Quality Securities list for the NBBO Setter Plus Program, effective March 1, 2026, is posted on the MIAX website . To learn more about MIAX Pearl Equities, please contact Sales@miaxglobal.com , (609) 897-8177 or visit miaxglobal.com. For further information, please contact MIAX Trading Operations at TradingOperations@miaxglobal.com or (609) 897-7302.

title: MIAX Pearl Equities Exchange - Reminder: Change Freeze to MEO, FOI, FXD and oFXD Port Upgrades from Wednesday, February 25, 2026 through Friday, February 27, 2026 due to upcoming Software Changes
raw_text:
MIAX Pearl Equities — Technical Alert, Trading Alert, Regulatory Alert — MIAX Pearl Equities Exchange - Reminder: Change Freeze to MEO, FOI, FXD and oFXD Port Upgrades from Wednesday, February 25, 2026 through Friday, February 27, 2026 due to upcoming Software Changes
Technical Alert, Trading Alert, Regulatory Alert MIAX Pearl Equities February 19, 2026 | 10:51 AM MIAX Pearl Equities Exchange - Reminder: Change Freeze to MEO, FOI, FXD and oFXD Port Upgrades from Wednesday, February 25, 2026 through Friday, February 27, 2026 due to upcoming Software Changes As previously announced in the January 30, 2026 Alert , please be advised that the MIAX Pearl Equities Exchange will perform software updates aimed at improving recovery time following hardware failures. The expected window for these updates is from Wednesday, February 25, 2026 through Friday, February 27, 2026. All updates will occur outside normal trading hours and trading will not be affected. The MIAX Pearl Equities Exchange will not accept requests for additions, removals or protocol changes to MEO, FOI, FXD and oFXD ports during the change freeze period. Requests for changes to port notifications, FXD permissions, RPM changes, and firm protection updates will be accepted during the period. Please contact Trading Operations at (609) 897-7302 or TradingOperations@miaxglobal.com with questions. Regulatory inquiries should be directed to Regulatory@miaxglobal.com .

title: MIAX Futures Exchange - Spring Wheat Options Expiration - March 2026
raw_text:
MIAX Futures — Clearing Alert, Trading Alert — MIAX Futures Exchange - Spring Wheat Options Expiration - March 2026
Clearing Alert, Trading Alert MIAX Futures February 19, 2026 | 04:09 PM MIAX Futures Exchange - Spring Wheat Options Expiration - March 2026 Expiration of March Spring Wheat option positions is scheduled for Friday, February 20, 2026. All Clearing Members should use the MIAX Futures Clearing System (MCS) to update and verify March Spring Wheat option positions by 4:30 PM CT. Clearing Members must submit position information by one of the following: Position Change Submission (PCS) file via SFTP PCS Reporting Specification can be found under Technical Specifications at MIAX Futures Interface Specifications Manually submitting positions to the MIAX Futures Clearing House and verifying in MCS by utilizing the gross position reporting and marking complete. Exception forms to exercise out-of-the money positions or not exercise in-the-money positions, should be submitted by 4:25 PM CT. Firms should expect to see assignments at approximately 5:10 PM CT on February 20, 2026. All account information can be added once option trades have been created. All account information must be added and completed by 7:30 AM CT on Monday, February 23, 2026. For additional information regarding the reporting process, please refer to the MIAX Futures Clearing System User Manual and instructional videos available at MIAX Futures Clearing Training Resources For more information, please contact MIAX Futures Clearing Operations at MIAXFuturesClearingOperations@miaxglobal.com or (612) 321-7146. title: MIAX Futures Exchange - Onyx Trading Platform - Rescheduled Go-Live and Industry Test Dates for Launch of Financial Futures
raw_text:
MIAX Futures — Regulatory Alert, Technical Alert, Trading Alert — MIAX Futures Exchange - Onyx Trading Platform - Rescheduled Go-Live and Industry Test Dates for Launch of Financial Futures
Regulatory Alert, Technical Alert, Trading Alert MIAX Futures February 03, 2026 | 03:37 PM MIAX Futures Exchange - Onyx Trading Platform - Rescheduled Go-Live and Industry Test Dates for Launch of Financial Futures As previously announced in the November 12, 2025 Alert , MIAX Futures will be introducing functionality to support trading of financial futures products on the MIAX Futures Onyx trading platform. These features are expected to be rolled out to users on Sunday, May 17, 2026 for the Monday, May 18, 2026 trade date. The MIAX Futures Financials Market Identifier Code (MIC) is XMFE. Financial futures products will trade in the NY5 data center. Financial Products Launch Schedule: B100 Tini Future - Sunday, May 17, 2026 for the Monday, May 18, 2026 trade date B500 Tini Future - Sunday, May 31, 2026 for the Monday, June 1, 2026 trade date B500 Standard Future - Sunday, June 7, 2026 for the Monday, June 8, 2026 trade date Important Dates : Industry Testing has been rescheduled for the following dates: Saturday, April 25, 2026 Saturday, May 9, 2026 Saturday, May 16, 2026 Support for financial futures trading is scheduled for Sunday, May 17, 2026 for the Monday, May 18, 2026 trade date Firm Test Bed and Production Cross-Connect connectivity requests are now being accepted The Firm Test Bed is now available for all features Updated Specifications are now available Market data agreements are now available Production interface access (FOI and FEI) and market data (TOM and DOM) will be available beginning Monday, April 13, 2026 Market participants should ensure clearing arrangements are in place with Options Clearing Corporation (OCC) members as MIAX Futures financial futures products will clear through OCC MIAX Futures Onyx Financial Futures Resources : Please visit the MIAX Futures Onyx site for the most recent information Updated MIAX Futures Onyx Interface Specifications are now available Updated MIAX Futures Onyx Exchange Fees Additional information on support for financial futures on MIAX Futures Onyx will be provided in future alerts, and any subsequent changes to product specifications remain subject to the submission of certain rule filings to the Commodity Futures Trading Commission. To learn more about MIAX Futures Onyx or new financial futures products please contact SalesFutures@miaxglobal.com . For further information, please contact MIAX Futures Trading Operations at MIAXFuturesTradingOperations@miaxglobal.com . To revise a current MIAX Alert subscription or to register to receive alerts for MIAX Futures, please visit MIAX Email Subscriptions .

title: NYSE Group - NYSE Pillar Outbound Timestamp Update
raw_text:
NYSE Group - NYSE Pillar Outbound Timestamp Update
Markets: NYSE, NYSE AMERICAN EQUITIES, NYSE ARCA EQUITIES, NYSE AMERICAN OPTIONS, NYSE ARCA OPTIONS, NYSE NATIONAL, NYSE TEXAS; Services: Trading, Post Trade, Market Data
Beginning March 23, 2026 , NYSE Group equities and options exchanges will implement changes to all FIX and Binary outbound gateway acknowledgement messages to reflect the time a triggering message reaches the queue to be delivered to the matching engine. This change is consistent with the November 2025 changes to initial acknowledgements for orders and cancels/replaces. These changes are available now for testing on all NYSE Group equities markets. Implementation Timeline Market Certification Production National Equities Available Monday, March 23, 2026 NYSE American Available Monday, March 30, 2026 NYSE Arca Available Thursday, April 2, 2026 NYSE Available Monday, April 13, 2026 NYSE Texas Available Thursday, April 16, 2026 NYSE American Options Friday, March 13, 2026 Monday, April 27, 2026 NYSE Arca Options Friday, March 6, 2026 Thursday, April 30, 2026 Please contact rmteam@nyse.com with any questions about this update.

title: NYSE Arca - Fee Changes Effective March 2, 2026
raw_text:
NYSE Arca - Fee Changes Effective March 2, 2026
Markets: NYSE ARCA EQUITIES; Services: Trading, Post Trade, Market Data
Effective March 2, 2026 , pending effectiveness of regulatory filings, NYSE Arca will revise its fee schedule to: Eliminate the $0.0029 fee for removing liquidity in Tape B for ETP Holders that qualify for Adding Tiers 1, 2, 3, 4, or 6. Cap the Tape B credit for Step Up Tier 3 at $0.0031. Tape B Remove Rate ETP Holders that qualify for Adding Tiers 1 - 6 will be subject to the standard fee of $0.0030 for removing liquidity in Tape B. Step Up Tier 3 - Maximum Tape B Credit ETP Holders qualifying for Step Up Tier 3 will not be eligible to receive additional Tape B Tier credits for adding displayed liquidity, including any credits associated with Less Active ETP Securities. The maximum Tape B credit for Step Up Tier 3 will be $0.0031. Please contact rmteam@nyse.com with questions about these changes.

title: NYSE American Options - NYSE Pillar Hardware Upgrade Postponement
raw_text:
NYSE American Options - NYSE Pillar Hardware Upgrade Postponement
Markets: NYSE AMERICAN OPTIONS; Services: Trading, Post Trade, Market Data
The NYSE American Options hardware upgrade for the NYSE Pillar technology platform has been postponed to Monday, March 9, 2026 . The migration will be an immediate cutover, with no parallel production period. Gateway IP Address Update As part of this upgrade, the Exchange will not be redistributing gateways with the new hardware, as previously announced. Firms' current primary and secondary gateway IP addresses will remain as assigned. Proprietary Market Data Feeds NYSE American Options Top (BBO and Trades), Deep and Complex (excluding Imbalance and Summary) proprietary market data feeds will increase from 17 to 24 Publisher, Refresh and Retransmission channels. Please refer to NYSE Proprietary Data IP Addresses for new channel information. There will be no XDP format changes. Customers should use the start of day symbol reference data for symbol mapping information. Revised Timeline Original Date New Date Industry Test #3 Saturday, February 28, 2026 Saturday, March 7, 2026 New Hardware in Production Monday, March 2, 2026 Monday, March 9, 2026 Heartbeats on new market data channels Monday, March 2, 2026 Monday, March 9, 2026 Test symbols on new market data channels Monday, March 9, 2026 Tuesday, March 17, 2026 DR Industry Test Saturday, March 28, 2026 Unchanged New hardware in DR Monday, March 30, 2026 Unchanged Production symbols on new market data channels Tuesday, March 31, 2026 Unchanged For further information, please refer to the NYSE Pillar NextGen Hardware Upgrade FAQs . Please contact rmteam@nyse.com with any questions about this update.

title: NYSE Arca Options: MXEA and MXEF MSCI Index Options Available for Trading on February 25, 2026
raw_text:
NYSE Arca Options: MXEA and MXEF MSCI Index Options Available for Trading on February 25, 2026
Markets: NYSE ARCA OPTIONS; Services: Trading, Post Trade, Market Data
Effective February 25, 2026 , options on the MSCI EAFE Index (MXEA) and the MSCI Emerging Markets Index (MXEF) will be listed and available for trading on NYSE Arca Options. NYSE's listing of MXEA and MXEF builds on ICE's decades-long partnership with MSCI, which includes providing the world's most liquid MSCI futures markets. Pending regulatory approval, NYSE American Options will list and trade MXEA and MXEF options in March, followed by additional MSCI index options on both NYSE options markets. For additional information, please visit https://www.nyse.com/trade/options/msci-global-index-options or contact rmteam@nyse.com .

title: NYSE Group - Industry Testing for Odd Lot SIP Changes
raw_text:
NYSE Group - Industry Testing for Odd Lot SIP Changes
Markets: NYSE, NYSE AMERICAN EQUITIES, NYSE ARCA EQUITIES, NYSE AMERICAN OPTIONS, NYSE ARCA OPTIONS, NYSE NATIONAL, NYSE TEXAS; Services: Trading, Post Trade, Market Data
Beginning April 27, 2026 , the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) will require that "Odd Lot" information be included in the Securities Information Processors (SIPs), as part of the Market Data Infrastructure (MDI) rules. To support these regulatory changes, NYSE Group markets will participate in scheduled industry testing. Please note that only select NYSE markets will be available for connectivity and order entry during industry test sessions. Saturday Test Schedule Test Date Available Market(s) March 7, 2026 NYSE Arca March 21, 2026 NYSE National, NYSE Arca Options, NYSE American Options March 28, 2026 NYSE National, NYSE American, NYSE Arca, NYSE Arca Options, NYSE American Options April 11, 2026 All NYSE Markets April 18, 2026 All NYSE Markets April 25, 2026 All NYSE Markets Please contact rmteam@nyse.com with questions regarding these changes.

title: FINRA/NYSE TRF®: System Hours Expanding Effective March 30, 2026
raw_text:
FINRA/NYSE TRF®: System Hours Expanding Effective March 30, 2026
Markets: FINRA/NYSE TRF; Services: Trading, Post Trade, Market Data
Beginning March 30, 2026, the FINRA/NYSE TRF® will open for trade reporting at 4:00 AM Eastern Time (ET), in accordance with FINRA Regulatory Notice 25-15 . Both the FINRA/NYSE TRF® and the NYSE TRF Portal are scheduled to be available from 4:00 AM to 8:00 PM ET each business day, including for the resubmission of Price Override rejects. For information on changes to firms' reporting obligations in connection with expanded hours, please refer to FINRA's rule filing: SR-FINRA-2025-011 . Please contact rmteam@nyse.com with any questions about this update.

title: NYSE Group: 2026 Testing Blackout, MWCB and DR Connectivity Dates
raw_text:
NYSE Group: 2026 Testing Blackout, MWCB and DR Connectivity Dates
Markets: NYSE, NYSE AMERICAN EQUITIES, NYSE ARCA EQUITIES, NYSE AMERICAN OPTIONS, NYSE ARCA OPTIONS, NYSE BONDS, FINRA/NYSE TRF, NYSE BQT, NYSE NATIONAL, NYSE TEXAS; Services: Trading, Post Trade, Market Data
In 2026, NYSE Group markets will observe the following testing schedule, including blackout dates when markets will be unavailable for testing, scheduled Market-Wide Circuit Breaker (MWCB) tests, and the annual Disaster Recovery (DR) Customer Connectivity and Functionality Test. 2026 Testing Blackout Dates Customer testing will not be available on the below dates (except as specified): February 14, 16 March 14 April 3, 4 May 23, 25 June 19, 20 July 3, 4 August 1 September 5, 7, 26 (2026 SIFMA Reg SCI pre-test #1) October 10 (2026 SIFMA Reg SCI pre-test #2) 24 (2026 SIFMA Reg SCI Test) November 26, 27, 28 December 19, 24, 25, 26 Market-Wide Circuit Breaker (MWCB) Testing NYSE Group will participate in MWCB testing on the following dates: April 11, 2026 SIP Failover / MWCB Level 1/2 Test #1 July 25, 2026 SIP Failover / MWCB Level 1/2 Test #2 September 12, 2026 MWCB Level 1/2/3 Test December 5, 2026 SIP Failover / MWCB Level 1/2 Test #3 Annual Disaster Recovery (DR) Customer Connectivity and Functionality Test The NYSE Group DR Customer Connectivity Test will be conducted on April 18, 2026 in the Cermak data center. For questions about the above tests or to register, please contact support@nyse.com . Please contact your relationship manager or rmteam@nyse.com with any other questions about these updates.

title: NYSE Exchanges to Close in Observance of Washington's Birthday
raw_text:
NYSE Exchanges to Close in Observance of Washington's Birthday
Markets: NYSE, NYSE AMERICAN EQUITIES, NYSE ARCA EQUITIES, NYSE AMERICAN OPTIONS, NYSE ARCA OPTIONS, NYSE BONDS, NYSE NATIONAL, NYSE TEXAS; Services: Trading
In observance of Washington's Birthday, the New York Stock Exchange, NYSE American Equities, NYSE Arca Equities, NYSE National, NYSE Texas, NYSE Arca Options, NYSE American Options, and NYSE Bonds markets will be closed on Monday, February 16, 2026. For more information on holidays, please see NYSE Holidays and Hours .

title: MX2 Options to Become a New OPRA Participant - Specs
raw_text:
MX2 Options to Become a New OPRA Participant - Specs
February 26, 2026 TO: OPRA Market Data Recipients FROM: OPRA, LLC SUBJECT: MX2 Options as a new OPRA Participant What’s New: MX2 Options received SEC approval to trade listed options October 1, 2025. What’s Changing: The new Exchange’s Participant ID is “G”. When is it Changing: • MX2 Options plans to begin trading options on September 14, 2026. Please see test and launch schedule below. For further updates please reference MEMX Trading - Alerts & Notices . User Acceptance Test 1 Saturday, August 15 User Acceptance Test 2 Saturday, August 29 User Acceptance Test 3 Saturday, September 12 Initial Launch with Limited Symbols Monday, September 14 Data Subscribers who receive OPRA from connectivity service providers other than ICE Global Network (IGN) or the NMS Network must contact their connectivity service providers to coordinate testing. Documentation The OPRA specifications have been revised to include MX2 Options as a new Participant in OPRA. Please reference the latest specifications which may be obtained at the website: www.opraplan.com/document- library. Technical Inquiries • NMS Product Management Support Email: CTA-OPRA-Support@siac.com • NMS Product Management Support Line: 212-656-8177, Option 2 • NMS Product Management Phone Support Hours: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM ET

OPRA New Symbol Distribution Final Reminder: Confidence Test 2/28 and Activation 3/2
February 20, 2026 To: OPRA Multicast Subscribers Subject: Final Testing Opportunity: New OPRA Symbol Distribution – Confidence Test Final Reminder: Saturday, February 28, 2026, and Activation, Monday, March 2, 2026 What’s New: For optimal symbol balancing and line capacity utilization, the symbol distribution for the Options Price Reporting Authority (OPRA) will be modified. Changes Being Made: The security symbol range over the OPRA will be redistributed. Reference the OPRA Traffic Distribution table below (page 2) for new symbol routing. The tables are available as CSV and Excel files. When it is Changing: OPRA will employ a new symbol distribution at the start of day Monday, March 2, 2026. Testing Dates: • Replay Testing: – Began: Monday, January 30, 2026 – Ends: Friday, February 27, 2026 – Weeknights between 7:00-8:00pm ET (15-minute period; variable time dependent on the completion of afterhours) over multicast Playback Test channels (not Production channels) • Production Confidence Test: – Saturday, February 28, 2026 (test plan on Page 3) • Activation Date: – Monday, March 2, 2026 Data Subscribers who receive OPRA from connectivity service providers other than ICE Global Network (IGN) or the NMS Network must contact their connectivity service providers to coordinate testing. title: New OPRA Dynamic Rebalance Symbol Distribution – Updates to Industry Test Dates, and Documentation
raw_text:
New OPRA Dynamic Rebalance Symbol Distribution – Updates to Industry Test Dates, and Documentation
February 18, 2026 To: OPRA Multicast Subscribers Subject: New OPRA Dynamic Rebalance Symbol Distribution – Industry Tests and Go-Live Date: November 23, 2026 - Updates to Industry Test Dates, and Documentation What’s New: As previously announced, OPRA is implementing a change to the message traffic distribution and balancing method it currently uses. After receiving survey feedback from over 40 OPRA Subscribers, to provide ample time for all OPRA consumers to be ready, the go-live implementation date will be November 23, 2026. Certification (Cert) System Testing: • Begins Monday, August 24, 2026 (Functional testing) Planned Industry Test dates: • Saturday, August 29, 2026 (Functional testing) • Saturday October 3, 2026 (Functional, Failure/Recovery, and Capacity testing) • Saturday, October 17, 2026 (Intraday fallback to November 20, 2026, symbol routing) • Saturday, October 31, 2026 (Final Functional testing) • Saturday, November 21, 2026 (Confidence Test prior to Go-Live) • Monday, November 23, 2026: Activation Go-Live Documentation: Following documents have been updated. • OPRA Pillar Output Specification • Common IP Multicast Distribution Network Specification • Multicast Channel Dynamic Balancing Plan Technical Inquiries • NMS Product Management Support Email: CTA-OPRA-Support@siac.com • NMS Product Management Support Line: 212-656-8177, Option 2 • NMS Product Management Phone Support Hours: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM ET Securities Industry Automation Corporation 11 Wall Street, New York, NY 10005 Securities Industry Automation Corporation 11 Wall Street, New York, NY 10005
